case_title: RAZVAN OLARIU VS. DENNIS KIRKPATRICK ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-25-2020 CONTINUED TO JAN-06-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100120987)
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF OLARIU, RAZVAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-23-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-06-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLARIU, RAZVAN AS TO DEFENDANT KIRKPATRICK, DENNIS AN INDIVIDUAL EUROPEAN COLLISION CENTER, LLC DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-25-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-25-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-02-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-23-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
